message:
Add optional adapter interfaces, TextStream, and gRPC error test coverage

9a: Adapters may optionally implement Close(), Initialize(), or
SupportsToolChoice() via separate interfaces. Client dispatches to them
when present, with sensible defaults otherwise.

9b: StreamResult.TextStream() returns a channel of text-delta strings,
filtering out all non-text events for convenient consumption.

9c: Verify Gemini gRPC status codes map correctly through existing
HTTP status-based error classification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
